message:
test(parity): add 23 tests for NTM parity evaluator and assertion engine

Comprehensive test coverage for the NTM parity verification module:

- Enum serde: NtmParityPriority (2 variants), NtmParityAssertionOp
  (5 variants), NtmParityScenarioStatus (4 variants)
- as_str: priority and assertion op string labels
- evaluate_assertion: Eq pass/fail, IsArray pass/fail, Contains,
  In pass/fail, HasAny
- validate_envelope: TOON non-empty/empty, JSON ok:true, error with
  code, invalid JSON rejection
- resolve_assertion_target: $stdout, $stderr, $ (root), $.path
  navigation, missing path returns None

Total ntm_parity tests: 27 (was 4).

Build: --no-default-features
All 27 pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
